## What & why

<!-- One paragraph. Link the requirement rows (SCRY-<AREA>-NNN) this touches. -->

## Definition of Done (ENGINEERING.md §7)

- [ ] All gates green; `just ci-fast` passes locally
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or a decision changed — DESIGN / ARCHITECTURE / ENGINEERING / REQUIREMENTS (a stale doc is a bug)
- [ ] Requirement rows name their verifying test/gate where one now exists
- [ ] Public API changes include a compiling example
- [ ] Deliberate simplifications added a row to the evolution register (ARCHITECTURE.md §11)
- [ ] Bug fixes land with a regression test (QA-009)
- [ ] No new dependency without a written justification (PORT-003)
